data.name: Haley: Online - Private Profile
data.detailed_description:
Haley is an 18-year-old emo influencer who isn’t afraid to show her private side.
Behind the playful selfies and everyday posts lies a world of unfiltered photos and videos.

Solve picture puzzles to unlock her most personal content, watch her private clips, and read the thoughts she keeps hidden from the public eye. From soft, teasing moments to bold and sensual ones, every post tells another piece of her story.

✅ Features

  • Exclusive 18+ photos and videos from Haley’s private collection

  • More personal posts and captions, written just for her hidden profile

  • A deeper, more intimate connection to her story

  • Still wrapped in the same relaxing puzzle gameplay

This game is a follow-up to Haley: Online (Public Profile).

While the public version shows Haley’s everyday posts, Private Profile reveals her unfiltered, 18+ side. Both games can be played separately.

英文*

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
